title: [The Webs We Weave]
description: Verdant suede-leafed foliage decorates the honeycomb-cut bronze cabinets angled in various corners of the shop, the wall-high partitions interconnected by a series of nakheva-woven webs.  A rectangular table of desert ironwood graces the far wall, its fine-grained surface lined with clusters of jewel-crafted bouquets arranged in riverglass vases.
